query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(totalAssets) as min_assets, MAX(totalAssets) as max_assets, MIN(totalFindings) as min_findings, MAX(totalFindings) as max_findings FROM domain_intel_scans GROUP BY status
